query: I'm planning a weekend hiking trip and need to pick up some essential gear with next-day delivery. First, I'm looking for a New Balance product with "Tech Fleece Jogger" in the name that has fewer than 10 one-star reviews, arrives within 1 day, and has total sales over 6000 to ensure it's reliable. Next, I need something called "Performance Tech Training Bottoms" in Black, with exactly 45 three-star ratings, more than 5000 total sales, and same-day delivery available. Finally, I want to get an item with "Men's Titan Pass Convertible Hiking Pants" in the name that's suitable for all seasons. It must have more than 100 four-star reviews, fewer than 15 two-star reviews, and can be delivered within 1 day so I have everything ready before I leave.

ground_truth_products.name: Men's Tech Fleece Jogger Pants
ground_truth_products.washing_instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

ground_truth_products.name: Men's Performance Tech Training Bottoms
ground_truth_products.details_craftsmanship: Side Pockets, Zipper Closure, Reflective Strips, Ribbed Cuffs
ground_truth_products.washing_instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Do not iron on prints.

ground_truth_products.name: Men's Titan Pass Convertible Hiking Pants
ground_truth_products.details_craftsmanship: Zipper Closure, Side Pockets, Reflective Strips, Patchwork
ground_truth_products.washing_instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Do not use fabric softener.

meta_info.sub_query: Find products where the brand is New Balance, the name contains Tech Fleece Jogger, 1-star reviews are less than 10, transport time is 1 day or less, and total sales volume is more than 6000.

Find products where the transport time is 1 day, the 3-star rating count is 45, the total sales volume is more than 5000, the color is Black, and the product name contains Performance Tech Training Bottoms.

Find products where the name contains 'Men's Titan Pass Convertible Hiking Pants', suitable season is All Seasons, 4-star reviews are more than 100, 2-star reviews are less than 15, and transport time is 1 day or less.

features.value: Men's Titan Pass Convertible Hiking Pants
